name: Almond Joy Chocolate Pie
recipeIngredient: 20 Almond Joy candy bars (miniatures or snack size)
16 Almond Joy candy bars (miniatures or snack size, cut into 1/2-inch pieces)
Sweetened whipped cream or whipped topping (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Almond Joy Crust: In a medium saucepan, stir together sugar, cornstarch, cocoa, and salt. Gradually blend in milk while stirring constantly with a wire whisk until the mixture boils. Continue boiling and stirring for 1 minute. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract. Add the melted candy pieces and stir until fully melted.
2. Pour the filling into the prepared crust.
3. Press plastic wrap onto the surface of the pie.
4. Refrigerate for at least 10 minutes, then chill completely on a rack before serving with sweetened whipped cream or whipped topping, if desired.
Serves: 6-8
